system.description: The Explorer has learned an additional Psychic Technique.
system.benefit: Once this Talent has been selected, the Explorer may select one new Psychic Technique in any Discipline he possesses with an XP cost equal to or lower than the Talent's XP cost. The Technique is gained through the Talent purchase and this Talent may be chosen multiple times, each selection granting an additional Technique.
system.notes: Each purchase grants one additional Psychic Technique in a Discipline the Explorer already possesses, subject to the Talent's XP limit.

specialAbilities.name: Learn Psychic Technique
specialAbilities.description: Select one new Psychic Technique in a Discipline you possess with an XP cost equal to or lower than this Talent's XP cost. Each purchase of this Talent grants one additional Technique.
